resources.string: Handles physical Push-to-Talk and Emergency buttons for Inrico devices.
Turn on safeT Mobile in the list. If you do not see a toggle, use the PC ADB steps shown after install.
TM-7 Plus (Android 10): if this page is empty, enable from your PC with USB debugging or scrcpy:
Could not open Accessibility settings. Open Settings → Accessibility manually, or use the Enable TM7 Plus Accessibility.bat script on your PC.
SafeT is on the physical screen but touch is not reaching the app. Touch may still be on the virtual display — use hardware keys or PC/scrcpy on Display 0.
PTT routing active in background. Tap to open.
